results.rendered_html: maghatti (magha + tti von 1. dā; vgl. bhagatti) f. das Geben und Empfangen von Geschenken (dhanadāna, dhanalābha  SĀY. )  ṚV. 8,24,10 . yaste revā~ adāśuriḥ pramamarṣa maghattaye 45,15 . udū ṣu ṇo mṛśasva mahyai maghattaye 59,9 . samaśvaṃ carṣaṇibhya ā puru śasta maghattaye 4,37,8 . yacciddhi te gaṇā ime chadayanti maghattaye 5,79,5 . 10,156,2 .
